title: System.NullReferenceException
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
ALTER TABLE test_table UPDATE name = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_table DELETE WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Transaction rollback during SQL execution causes null reference exception
